# FootyPredict SEO Configuration
# Allow search engines to crawl all pages

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /private

# Crawl delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specific rules for popular search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://footypredict.ai/sitemap.xml
